name: Indoor Golf Sims
about: Indoor Golf Sims is a dual-simulator facility located in Orleans, MA, offering year-round golf play. The venue features two widescreen simulators with access to over 100 courses, online multiplayer capabilities, a driving range, and a short game area. Pricing is time-based, with a one-hour minimum, and rates vary by day of the week. The facility operates on a booking-centric model, with physical attendance dependent on scheduled tee times. Notably, the venue has implemented a strict cancellation policy and a 'no political discussions' policy to maintain a focused golfing environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Two high-quality widescreen simulators for a premium experience
Access to over 100 courses, including online play functionality
Dedicated areas for both driving practice and short game work
Weekday and weekend hours with flexible booking options

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service found. BYOB not explicitly mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Website does not specify simulator hardware brands, only that there are two widescreen simulators.
